title: Add debounce utility to timing-helpers.ts
description: Create debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(fn: T, delayMs: number): T in src/utils/timing-helpers.ts with tests. The function should delay fn execution until delayMs milliseconds have elapsed since the last call, using only the last arguments.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - existing debounce implementation with similar logic
src/utils/debounce.test.ts - comprehensive test patterns using vitest fake timers
